headline: How The AMD (AMD) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI Deals And Mixed Analyst Targets
summary: Analysts are revisiting their price targets for Advanced Micro Devices, using an unchanged US$289.61 fair value estimate as the anchor while tweaking underlying assumptions. Much of the recent commentary turns on how the expanded GPU agreement with Meta, links to OpenAI, and a growing ecosystem in data center and edge inference are or are not already captured in those targets. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting views and what to watch as the story around AMD continues to...

headline: Corning Meta Fiber Expansion Tests High Valuation And AI Growth Story
summary: Corning and Meta Platforms have begun construction on a major expansion of Corning’s optical cable manufacturing facilities in North Carolina. The project supports a multiyear partnership to supply next generation fiber for advanced AI data centers across the U.S. The expansion is intended to increase U.S. based production capacity for fiber used in AI focused data infrastructure. For investors watching Corning, NYSE:GLW, this new buildout comes as the stock trades at $147.92 with a return...
